will not be advancing further in clinical development. Customs in 2023, we have asserted our rights under the U.S./</span></div><div style="font-size:12pt;line-height:10pt;position:var(--position);top:525.25pt;width:612pt"><span style="font-family:'Times New Roman', serif;font-size:10pt;font-style:normal;font-weight:normal;left:54pt;position:var(--position);text-decoration:none;white-space:pre">U.K. Income Tax Convention pursuant to the mutual agreement procedures for the relief of double taxation for these matters.</span></div><div style="font-size:12pt;line-height:10pt;position:var(--position);top:546.25pt;width:612pt"><span style="font-family:'Times New Roman', serif;font-size:10pt;font-style:normal;font-weight:normal;left:72pt;position:var(--position);text-decoration:none;white-space:pre">In December 2022, European Union member states reached an agreement to implement the minimum tax component </span></div><div style="font-size:12pt;line-height:10pt;position:var(--position);top:558.25pt;width:612pt"><span style="font-family:'Times New Roman', serif;font-size:10pt;font-style:normal;font-weight:normal;left:54pt;position:var(--position);text-decoration:none;white-space:pre">(&#8220;Pillar Two&#8221;) of the Organization for Economic Co-operation and Development&#8217;s (the &#8220;OECD&#8217;s&#8221;), global international tax </span></div><div style="font-size:12pt;line-height:10pt;position:var(--position);top:570.25pt;width:612pt"><span style="font-family:'Times New Roman', serif;font-size:10pt;font-style:normal;font-weight:normal;left:54pt;position:var(--position);text-decoration:none;white-space:pre">reform initiative with effective dates of January 1, 2024 and 2025. On January 5, 2026, the OECD announced that a &#8216;side-by-</span></div><div style="font-size:12pt;line-height:10pt;position:var(--position);top:582.25pt;width:612pt"><span style="font-family:'Times New Roman', serif;font-size:10pt;font-style:normal;font-weight:normal;left:54pt;position:var(--position);text-decoration:none;white-space:pre">side&#8217; agreement was reached with member countries creating safe harbors to exempt U.S. multi-nationals from certain taxes </span></div><div style="font-size:12pt;line-height:10pt;position:var(--position);top:594.25pt;width:612pt"><span style="font-family:'Times New Roman', serif;font-size:10pt;font-style:normal;font-weight:normal;left:54pt;position:var(--position);text-decoration:none;white-space:pre">under the Pillar Two regime by recognizing the U.S. tax system as a compatible domestic minimum tax regime. Our exposure </span></div><div style="font-size:12pt;line-height:10pt;position:var(--position);top:606.25pt;width:612pt"><span style="font-family:'Times New Roman', serif;font-size:10pt;font-style:normal;font-weight:normal;left:54pt;position:var(--position);text-decoration:none;white-space:pre">to other countries&#8217; minimum tax regimes was limited before these changes, but the side-by-side agreement allows for </span></div><div style="font-size:12pt;line-height:10pt;position:var(--position);top:618.25pt;width:612pt"><span style="font-family:'Times New Roman', serif;font-size:10pt;font-style:normal;font-weight:normal;left:54pt;position:var(--position);text-decoration:none;white-space:pre">certainty as our structure may change in the future.</span></div><div style="font-size:12pt;line-height:10pt;position:var(--position);top:639.25pt;width:612pt"><span style="font-family:'Times New Roman', serif;font-size:10pt;font-style:normal;font-weight:normal;left:72pt;position:var(--position);text-decoration:none;white-space:pre">In July 2025, the U.S. enacted H.R.1, which includes significant provisions modifying the U.S. tax framework, including </span></div><div style="font-size:12pt;line-height:10pt;position:var(--position);top:651.25pt;width:612pt"><span style="font-family:'Times New Roman', serif;font-size:10pt;font-style:normal;font-weight:normal;left:54pt;position:var(--position);text-decoration:none;white-space:pre">the ability for companies to immediately deduct research and development expenditures for 2025 and provisions for </span></div><div style="font-size:12pt;line-height:10pt;position:var(--position);top:663.25pt;width:612pt"><span style="font-family:'Times New Roman', serif;font-size:10pt;font-style:normal;font-weight:normal;left:54pt;position:var(--position);text-decoration:none;white-space:pre">deducting previously capitalized amounts. H.R.1 does not have a material impact on our U.S. taxes for the first quarter of </span></div><div style="font-size:12pt;line-height:10pt;position:var(--position);top:675.25pt;width:612pt"><span style="font-family:'Times New Roman', serif;font-size:10pt;font-style:normal;font-weight:normal;left:54pt;position:var(--position);text-decoration:none;white-space:pre">2026, </span><span style="font-family:'Times New Roman', serif;font-size:10pt;font-style:normal;font-weight:normal;left:79pt;position:var(--position);text-decoration:none;white-space:pre">but we expect further guidance to be issued.</span><span style="font-family:'Times New Roman', serif;font-size:10pt;font-style:normal;font-weight:normal;left:254.91pt;position:var(--position);text-decoration:none;white-space:pre"> We will review guidance when issued for impacts on future years and </span></div><div style="font-size:12pt;line-height:10pt;position:var(--position);top:687.25pt;width:612pt"><span style="font-family:'Times New Roman', serif;font-size:10pt;font-style:normal;font-weight:normal;left:54pt;position:var(--position);text-decoration:none;white-space:pre">disclose any impacts if needed at that time. Our CF strategy involves continuing to develop and obtain approval and reimbursement for treatment regimens that will </span></div><div style="font-size:12pt;line-height:10pt;position:var(--position);top:279pt;width:612pt"><span style="font-family:'Times New Roman', serif;font-size:10pt;font-style:normal;font-weight:normal;left:54pt;position:var(--position);white-space:pre">provide benefits </span><span style="font-family:'Times New Roman', serif;font-size:10pt;font-style:normal;font-weight:normal;left:121.15pt;position:var(--position);text-decoration:none;white-space:pre">to all people with CF </span><span style="font-family:'Times New Roman', serif;font-size:10pt;font-style:normal;font-weight:normal;left:208pt;position:var(--position);white-space:pre">and increasing the number of people with CF eligible and able to receive our </span></div><div style="font-size:12pt;line-height:10pt;position:var(--position);top:291pt;width:612pt"><span style="font-family:'Times New Roman', serif;font-size:10pt;font-style:normal;font-weight:normal;left:54pt;position:var(--position);white-space:pre">medicines. O</span><span style="font-family:'Times New Roman', serif;font-size:10pt;font-style:normal;font-weight:normal;left:106.71000000000001pt;position:var(--position);text-decoration:none;white-space:pre">utside of CF</span><span style="font-family:'Times New Roman', serif;font-size:10pt;font-style:normal;font-weight:normal;left:156.12pt;position:var(--position);white-space:pre">, we continue to advance</span><span style="font-family:'Times New Roman', serif;font-size:10pt;font-style:normal;font-weight:normal;left:255.16pt;position:var(--position);text-decoration:none;white-space:pre"> the commercialization of CASGEVY for the treatment of SCD and TDT, </span></div><div style="font-size:12pt;line-height:10pt;position:var(--position);top:303pt;width:612pt"><span style="font-family:'Times New Roman', serif;font-size:10pt;font-style:normal;font-weight:normal;left:54pt;position:var(--position);text-decoration:none;white-space:pre">and </span><span style="font-family:'Times New Roman', serif;font-size:10pt;font-style:normal;font-weight:normal;left:70.93pt;position:var(--position);white-space:pre">JOURNAVX for the treatment of acute pain, and we are preparing for a potential launch of povetacicept for the treatment </span></div><div style="font-size:12pt;line-height:10pt;position:var(--position);top:315pt;width:612pt"><span style="font-family:'Times New Roman', serif;font-size:10pt;font-style:normal;font-weight:normal;left:54pt;position:var(--position);white-space:pre">of IgAN. In addition, we </span><span style="font-family:'Times New Roman', serif;font-size:10pt;font-style:normal;font-weight:normal;left:155.32pt;position:var(--position);text-decoration:none;white-space:pre">are advancing our pipeline of product candidates for the treatment of serious diseases outside of CF, </span></div><div style="font-size:12pt;line-height:10pt;position:var(--position);top:327pt;width:612pt"><span style="font-family:'Times New Roman', serif;font-size:10pt;font-style:normal;font-weight:normal;left:54pt;position:var(--position);text-decoration:none;white-space:pre">SCD, TDT and acute pain.</span></div><div style="line-height:10pt;position:var(--position);top:348pt;width:612pt"><span style="font-family:'Times New Roman', serif;font-size:10pt;font-style:normal;font-weight:normal;left:72pt;position:var(--position);white-space:pre">Our strategy is to combine transformative advances in the understanding of causal human biology and the science of </span></div><div style="line-height:10pt;position:var(--position);top:360pt;width:612pt"><span style="font-family:'Times New Roman', serif;font-size:10pt;font-style:normal;font-weight:normal;left:54pt;position:var(--position);white-space:pre">therapeutics to discover and develop innovative medicines. We aim to serially innovate in our disease areas of interest and follow our first-in-class therapies with potential best-</span></div><div style="line-height:10pt;position:var(--position);top:408pt;width:612pt"><span style="font-family:'Times New Roman', serif;font-size:10pt;font-style:normal;font-weight:normal;left:54pt;position:var(--position);white-space:pre">in-class candidates to provide durable clinical and commercial success.</span></div><div style="line-height:10pt;position:var(--position);top:429pt;width:612pt"><span style="font-family:'Times New Roman', serif;font-size:10pt;font-style:normal;font-weight:normal;left:72pt;position:var(--position);white-space:pre">In pursuit of new product candidates and therapies in specialty markets, we invest in research and development. We </span></div><div style="line-height:10pt;position:var(--position);top:441pt;width:612pt"><span style="font-family:'Times New Roman', serif;font-size:10pt;font-style:normal;font-weight:normal;left:54pt;position:var(--position);white-space:pre">believe that pursuing research in diverse areas allows us to balance the risks inherent in product development and may </span></div><div style="line-height:10pt;position:var(--position);top:453pt;width:612pt"><span style="font-family:'Times New Roman', serif;font-size:10pt;font-style:normal;font-weight:normal;left:54pt;position:var(--position);white-space:pre">provide product candidates that will form our pipeline in future years. Across the industry, most potential </span></div><div style="line-height:10pt;position:var(--position);top:534pt;width:612pt"><span style="font-family:'Times New Roman', serif;font-size:10pt;font-style:normal;font-weight:normal;left:54pt;position:var(--position);white-space:pre">drug or biological products never progress into development, and most products that advance into development never receive </span></div><div style="line-height:10pt;position:var(--position);top:546pt;width:612pt"><span style="font-family:'Times New Roman', serif;font-size:10pt;font-style:normal;font-weight:normal;left:54pt;position:var(--position);white-space:pre">marketing approval. We closely monitor our research </span></div><div style="line-height:10pt;position:var(--position);top:558pt;width:612pt"><span style="font-family:'Times New Roman', serif;font-size:10pt;font-style:normal;font-weight:normal;left:54pt;position:var(--position);white-space:pre">and development activities, and frequently evaluate our pipeline programs in light of new data and scientific, business and </span></div><div style="line-height:10pt;position:var(--position);top:570pt;width:612pt"><span style="font-family:'Times New Roman', serif;font-size:10pt;font-style:normal;font-weight:normal;left:54pt;position:var(--position);white-space:pre">commercial insights, with the objective of balancing risk and potential. Our analysis of data obtained </span></div><div style="line-height:10pt;position:var(--position);top:618pt;width:612pt"><span style="font-family:'Times New Roman', serif;font-size:10pt;font-style:normal;font-weight:normal;left:54pt;position:var(--position);white-space:pre">from nonclinical and clinical activities is subject to confirmation and interpretation by regulatory authorities, which could </span></div><div style="line-height:10pt;position:var(--position);top:630pt;width:612pt"><span style="font-family:'Times New Roman', serif;font-size:10pt;font-style:normal;font-weight:normal;left:54pt;position:var(--position);white-space:pre">delay, limit or prevent regulatory approval.</span></div><div style="line-height:10pt;position:var(--position);top:651pt;width:612pt"><span style="font-family:'Times New Roman', serif;font-size:10pt;font-style:normal;font-weight:normal;left:72pt;position:var(--position);white-space:pre">Our business also requires ensuring appropriate manufacturing and supply of our products. We </span></div><div style="line-height:10pt;position:var(--position);top:123pt;width:612pt"><span style="font-family:'Times New Roman', serif;font-size:10pt;font-style:normal;font-weight:normal;left:54pt;position:var(--position);white-space:pre">dedicate substantial management and other resources to obtain and maintain appropriate levels of reimbursement for our </span></div><div style="line-height:10pt;position:var(--position);top:135pt;width:612pt"><span style="font-family:'Times New Roman', serif;font-size:10pt;font-style:normal;font-weight:normal;left:54pt;position:var(--position);white-space:pre">products from third-party payors, including governmental organizations in the U.S. and ex-U.S. markets. As a result, $4.4&#160;billion of the fair value attributed to povetacicept was expensed as AIPR&amp;D in 2024. </span></div><div
